text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Taishin! Play shiritori with me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Come ooon! Which is more important to you, that
game or me?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! I won! No words that end with "x"! You'd
know that if you were paying attention!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! I win again! Isn't my genius just amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! Three wins in a row! I need to tell Hayahide
right away!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yup. Good idea. You go do that.
